inputs.label: Başlangıç Tarihi (Seri No)
inputs.businessContext: Start date as serial day number (e.g., Excel)

inputs.label: Bitiş Tarihi (Seri No)
inputs.businessContext: End date as serial day number

inputs.label: Başlangıç Günü Dahil
inputs.businessContext: 1 if start day is included, 0 otherwise

inputs.label: Bitiş Günü Dahil
inputs.businessContext: 1 if end day is included, 0 otherwise

inputs.label: Haftalık Tatil Gün Sayısı
inputs.businessContext: Number of weekend days per week (e.g., 2 for Sat-Sun)

inputs.label: Resmi Tatiller
inputs.businessContext: Number of public holidays falling on weekdays
